channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Knocked over tree outside 59 Lawford Road NW5 2LG, 25th June
item.description:
Waitrose home delivery driver has knocked tree over at approximately 18.10 today 25/6/2026. Driver heard and seen reporting incident to manager on phone. Another resident witnessing incident, so as not to inflame situation I did not take photo of van or driver at the scene.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Lawford Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Water unit, 25th June
item.description:
Water unit

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellefields Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty toilet paper from the drains all over pavement, 25th June
item.description:
Following Monday night storm, there is dirty toilet paper all over the pavement and also faeces. This is on maythorne cottages.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Springbank Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned silver Audi, 25th June
item.description:
Abandoned silver Audi which has been there for a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): The Mothers Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen and loose signal column, 25th June
item.description:
Fallen and loose signal column at the bus gate on the Southwark managed part of Crystal Palace Parade. The column is loose in the ground and fallen over. It has been left like this for MONTHS. Remedial action is long over due and bus gate design is being left dangerous as sub standard. Urgent action required to repair.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Parade, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amount of fly tipped furniture, 25th June
item.description:
As you can see - someone has dump the contents of their entire flat . Grim is an understatement. Why is this problem not getting any better?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37, Holbeach Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Human feces in staircase, 25th June
item.description:
There is a lot poo which looks like human faeces on the staircase. Random people are always lurking around, and it's absolutely disgusting. This is not the first time.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoxton Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Milman, 25th June
item.description:
Fly tip
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Milman Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Fly tipping again at the entrance to the development, 25th June
item.description:
A suitcase and loads of clothes have been left at the entrance to the development at 291 Hackney Road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hackney Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 59 Lawford rd, 25th June
item.description:
Tree has been hit by a lorry or similar today 25.6.26 (there were council works here today). The tree has been partly uprooted.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56-58, Bartholomew Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Public urinating, 25th June
item.description:
People consuming alcohol and urinating in public in Camberwell Green next to children’s playground.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Camberwell Green, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Resident Trees - Overgrowth Blocking Walkway, 25th June
item.description:
Please issue notices to 76/74 Greenwood Road to trim back their trees. They’re blocking more than 50% of the walkway.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 25th June
item.description:
Bins permanently left on pavement. Overflowing as not emptied by council trucks on bin collection. Spilling on the street and has a stench from food waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nadine Street, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: X3 Dead fox’s at the back of Swayland Road Belvedere Kent DA186LS, 25th June
item.description:
Dead foxes on public land at the back of swayland Rd
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swaylands Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree in centre dual carriageway hitting buses, 25th June
item.description:
Tree in centre dual carriageway hitting buses or tall lorries unless they drive into the cycle track to avoid. Cyclists at risk of large vehicles swerving into their cycle track. Tree strikes risk branches breaking and handing down and hitting motorcycles or cars. New road design of dual carriageway is unsafe with the current poor tree maintenance provided by LB Southwark This is not the first time these central trees are hitting vehicles. Tje last time needed the fire-brigade to attend a broken branch. The road design needs a wider central island and small green verge so risk of tree strikes is reduced, or improved tree management.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dulwich Wood Park, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely poor road conditions, 25th June
item.description:
Uneven and just generally poor road conditions around this area. So much so that even driving under the legal you can still damage your car. It's been like this for a couple of years now but it's getting worse and worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lingfield Crescent, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request for Drop kerb, 25th June
item.description:
I submitted an application forva drop kerb to my property Form has been submitted, and deposit taken Apart from providing my home with off street parking this request will also stop 5he need for some repairs to uneven paving and free up road space in a congested road at the times of heavy usage of the Church opposite. Xan this allocation be chased please as I have a contractor on stand by to carry out works the my front garden areas. Many thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenscroft Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 6 lime bikes abandoned, 25th June
item.description:
6 lime bikes abandoned at top of Crescent Way since this morning. Attached photo is just 2 of them. Lime is out of control.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24-25, Crescent Way, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: House hold items dumped on one side of Hylton, 25th June
item.description:
And a large dump of clothes on the other side of Hylton. Been here a couple of days. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 25th June
item.description:
There is rubbish all over the road which has been there all week including a large bottle filled with urine. This is a result of the drug activity and anti social behaviour which takes place in this area almost daily.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harvey Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
